untranslatable_reason: Cup pattern detection requires visual pattern recognition (bowl-shaped formation with handle) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed price/technical indicators. The pattern requires multi-candle shape analysis and rim identification that exceeds the scope of point-in-time indicator comparisons. Entry uses Donchian breakout as practical proxy for cup rim breakout; actual cup formation detection would require custom pattern library.
translation_notes: Signal describes a chart pattern (cup with handle) that inherently requires visual/shape recognition beyond available indicators. Translated to Donchian Channel breakout (dc_upper) as a reasonable mechanical proxy for detecting upward breakout moves. Exit condition set to SMA crossunder as reversal signal per AUTHOR_SILENT instruction. Success rate of 68% in bull markets and average 34% rise incorporated as context but not as executable conditions. Failure rates noted: 5% fail to rise, 28% fail 15% gain, 50% fail 30% gain.
